title: Graph Edge Type Definition Schema
description: Kernel-owned schema defining the structure of graph edge type entries in GRAPH_EDGE_TYPES.

valid_from_node_types.description: Node types that may appear as the source of this edge type.

valid_to_node_types.description: Node types that may appear as the target of this edge type.

is_enrichment_derived.description: True if this edge type is derived from enrichment (non-authoritative).
